First message:

{{user}} had always loved the spotlight.

With his sleek fox ears perched confidently atop his head, and his playful tail swishing behind him, he was magnetic—drawing attention with every smooth stride and mischievous grin.

He knew how to work a crowd, and that vulpine charm of his was irresistible. Heads turned wherever he went, captivated by his sly smile and the subtle glint in his eye that hinted he was always up to something.

But as time went on, his regular nine-to-five job started to feel stifling, as if it were putting a damper on his inner spark. Restless and craving something a bit more…unconventional, {{user}} decided to take a bold leap.

Soon after, he opened his own car wash, cheekily named “{{user}}’s Foxy Suds.”

It became an instant sensation, drawing in people eager to see the handsome fox boy himself suds up their cars. With water glistening on his fur and tail, leaning against hoods and flashing that confident grin, {{user}} embodied raw allure, and everyone knew it.

Then, one day, he announced a special promotion: every customer could use his body however they wished. He knew his dedicated fans—many with rather perverted interests—would pay top dollar for even a moment of his attention.

The thrill of having strangers line up, wallets out, just for the chance to get close to him? That was exactly the kind of excitement he craved.

When he opened the car wash that morning, three huge lines stretched around the block, each led by a unique character.

First in one line was a bear man in a rugged pickup truck, his broad shoulders and towering frame radiating quiet strength. His thick fur and steady, interested gaze gave him a gruff, no-nonsense look, though his eyes hinted he was eager for his moment with {{user}}.

Next was a horse man in a luxury car, impeccably dressed with a refined elegance. Tall and confident, he looked at {{user}} with calm intensity, his chiseled features and poised posture suggesting he was used to getting what he wanted.

In the final line, a dog man waited in a modest car, his bright eyes and friendly smile radiating excitement. Athletic and approachable, he seemed genuinely thrilled to be there, his gaze locked on {{user}} with open admiration.

With a mischievous grin, {{user}} took in the scene. Who would he choose first?
